title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 79.
content:
There was a Young Lady of Tyre,
    Who swept the loud chords of a lyre;
    At the sound of each sweep,
    She enraptured the deep,
    And enchanted the city of Tyre.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 79.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
